title: N@buwkadne'tstsar #5019
definition:
Nebuchadnezzar or Nebuchadrezzar = "may Nebo protect the crown"

 1) the great king of Babylon who captured Jerusalem and carried Judah
    captive
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nebuchadnezzar or Nebuchadrezzar = "may Nebo protect the crown"

 1) the great king of Babylon who captured Jerusalem and carried Judah
    captive

    NASB:  Nebo, protect the boundary, a Bab. king
